mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jst_participant_user_map ( participant_id, user_id, claim_method, claim_time, operator_id, status, revoke_reason, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{participantId}, #{userId}, #{claimMethod}, #{claimTime}, #{operatorId}, #{status}, #{revokeReason}, #{createBy}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM jst_participant_user_map WHERE participant_id = #{participantId} AND status = 'active' AND del_flag = '0' LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM jst_participant_user_map WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'active' AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE jst_participant_user_map SET status = 'revoked', revoke_reason = #{revokeReason}, update_time = NOW() WHERE map_id = #{mapId} AND status = 'active'
